focus: Sync latest demand-data-generation active artifact into the assessment app.
reasonStarted: The upstream active demand export was updated at data/json/demand-intelligence-v0.1.0.active.json and needs to be consumed by assessment reports.

new: The assessment app should consume the latest active demand artifact with 929 active records.
Cleaning demand fit should include expanded city-level records and Keyword Planner monthly search counts.
Restoration & Remediation should be classified and assessed when website evidence clearly matches that sector.
reused: Generated demand data remains owned by demand-data-generation and consumed as a release artifact.
Customer Demand Fit must keep found evidence, missing signals, confidence, monthly search counts, and pages checked traceable.
Unsupported or unclear website industries skip demand scoring honestly.

validation.build: passed with existing documented Turbopack tracing warning
validation.cloudflareBuild: passed with existing documented OpenNext tsconfig warning

builtPackageSmoke.cleaning: Cleaning assessed with 177 records evaluated, 48 monthly-count records, and monthly-search opportunities available.
builtPackageSmoke.restoration_remediation: Restoration & Remediation assessed with 238 records evaluated and 9 monthly-count records available.

staging.selfQaSummary: Completed with 8 pages crawled, high evidence confidence, Cleaning demand satisfaction, 177 records evaluated, 48 monthly-count records, and 5 monthly-search opportunities.

production.selfQaSummary: Completed with 8 pages crawled, high evidence confidence, Cleaning demand satisfaction, 177 records evaluated, 48 monthly-count records, and 5 monthly-search opportunities.

knownRisks: The assessment app still consumes demand data by copied release artifact; automated upstream sync remains deferred.
